offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, missed payment deadlines cause late fees. We send reminder alerts instead of manual tracking of payment deadlines.
problem: Late vendor payments due to missed deadlines.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
Direct message outreach to accounting firms with demo
Participate in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try deadline tracking on 1-3 invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing invoices
